title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.320 - State agencies to cooperate
text:
226.320.  State agencies to cooperate. — State agencies owning or controlling various state-owned areas or state-owned easements or interests therein of state agencies are hereby authorized to cooperate in the conveyance of such lands, easements or interests to and in favor of the United States for this national parkway.
(RSMo 1939 § 8794)
